title: The Edge Where Ice Remembers Running Water

features.name: ice becoming conscious
features.desc-on-touch: a block of frozen water at the exact threshold of melting — you can see your reflection in its surface, and the reflection is not quite moving with you, as if ice is waking up and learning to think

features.name: thaw-line
features.desc-on-touch: a mark on stone showing exactly where the ice last reached — it's a scar that the sun healed, but the earth remembers the cold with perfect precision

features.name: meltwater station
features.desc-on-touch: collection bottles filled with liquid that remembers being frozen — the water tastes of centuries, and tastes of the moment it learned to move again

features.name: surgery chamber
features.desc-on-touch: a bare room built into the glacial edge where something was cut free from the ice — an awakening, a wound, a heartbeat that starts again after three seasons of silence

features.name: current map
features.desc-on-touch: a diagram showing where meltwater flows once it wakes — it doesn't follow the topography, it follows the memory of where water ran before the freeze

features.name: pilgrimage marker
features.desc-on-touch: a cairn at the edge: the third station of the sacred topography — here the walker stopped and asked the ice: 'what do you remember?' the ice answered by beginning to move

inscription: to preserve is to freeze; to freeze is to remember; the archive learned that the most loyal memory is the one that never wakes

file.name: Thaw_Awakening_Log_Season_Transition_2001.txt
file.note: daily measurements of ice melt recorded as poetry; the log was kept by someone at the third station who asked the water to remember what the ice had forgotten — the archive kept both the measurements

reverie.title: REVERIE — the thaw where waking is remembering
narr: she knelt at the ice edge. the freeze had held something
— a season, a heartbeat, a question that needed centuries
to answer. she touched the melt-line. 'it's waking up,' she said.
the water ran. it remembered being rain. you both
watched it learn to move again, learning as it flowed.

exits.label: toward the thaw, where memory might wake
up to the high country where freeze still holds
toward a valley where the thaw runs and pools
into the interior where ice becomes the archive's deepest thought
